hero.heading: How PeptidePure™ Works
hero.subtitle: A smarter, cleaner path to peptide medicine — without the risks, uncertainty, or gray market.

intro.heading: PeptidePure™ Gives Licensed Clinicians a Smarter Path
paragraphs: We provide the most in-demand, best-studied peptides and deliver them in the right milligram strengths with streamlined, clinician-friendly protocols. No confusion. No wasted time. No losing money chasing hype. Just better outcomes for patients and a better system for providers.
Stop chasing the gray market. Lead with precision. Practice medicine the right way.

educationalFocus.heading: Educational & Clinical Focus
items: Order with confidence for use within approved observational research frameworks
Choose from our most-utilized protocol packages (GLP-based programs, GH secretagogues, mitochondrial support)
Optionally select individual compounds as needed for your clinic (MOOs may apply)
Reorder on a monthly cadence aligned with protocol design and participant demand
Access our education library for reconstitution guidance, dosing references, and peer-reviewed literature
Join our professional community for ongoing updates on emerging compounds and regulatory landscape

createAccount.heading: Create Account
createAccount.description: Create a secure account using your professional credentials. Access is limited to licensed healthcare professionals (MD, DO, PA-C, NP, ND, DC, and qualified researchers). Once registered, your account enters credential review.

afterVerification.heading: After Verification
items: Use compounds for professional education and research consistent with applicable regulations

solutionFeatures.title: 3rd Party COAs
solutionFeatures.desc: Multi-lab verification on every lot (≥99% purity, sterility). Labeling with your logo and "Clinician Use Only". Never the red-flag "Not for Human or Animal Use".

solutionFeatures.title: > 99% Purity
solutionFeatures.desc: Sourcing from ISO 9001-certified, cGMP-compliant manufacturers with DMF- or CEP-backed API, or FDA-registered 503A/503B and research grade facilities.

solutionFeatures.title: Fast Shipping
solutionFeatures.desc: U.S.A.-based fulfillment with secure packaging and tracking. Designed to meet the operational needs of busy clinical practices.

items.label: Natural Peptides
items.desc: Identified in biological systems, each with unique functions and potential therapeutic applications.

items.label: FDA-Approved
items.desc: Peptide-based medications currently available, with hundreds more in clinical trials.

items.label: Market Value
items.desc: Projected global peptide therapeutics market by 2028, growing at over 8% annually.

items.label: Targeting Precision
items.desc: Unprecedented specificity vs. conventional pharmaceuticals, with fewer systemic side effects.

steps.heading: Review. Register. Implement.
steps.subtitle: A peptide supply platform designed for real clinical growth.

items.title: Contact Peptide Pure
items.desc: Connect with our team to review access options and determine the right fit for your clinical site. Or simply sign up online; we will verify your NPI number.

items.title: Implement With Confidence
items.desc: Access reconstitution guidance, dosing references, patient education templates, and informed consent templates — designed to support consistent, defensible clinical workflows.

items.title: Optimize Ongoing Ordering
items.desc: As your clinic and patient volume grow, refine your monthly ordering based on real demand. Once product needs are established, lead times are reduced and reordering becomes streamlined and automatic.

cta.heading: Ready to Practice Peptide Medicine the Right Way?
